creator: meka@tilda.center
text: As stated in https://issues.prosody.im/1516 there are issues with lualdap versions < 1.2.5, and the latest version on luaforge is 1.1.0. On top of that, there are problems with config: https://github.com/lualdap/lualdap/blob/master/config. If I were to write update for this port, what would  be best way to do it? I was thinking about GH_* vars in Makefile, but please advise.
